text.tspan: This document serves as a comprehensive demonstration of the md_to_docx converter capabilities. It
showcases the various formatting features and document elements that can be automatically converted
from Markdown syntax to professional Microsoft Word documents.
The primary objectives of this showcase are to:
such as emphasis, inline code, and paragraph styling
including ordered, unordered, and nested list structures
with various formatting options and column width controls
including standalone images, figure groups, and size controls
capabilities for figures, tables, and sections
